summary: Iteration 5: Comprehensive backend testing completed - 33/33 tests passed (100%). All 7 requested features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 user roles login correctly: student, supervisor, implant_incharge, administrator, nurse
Full 4-phase workflow working: pending_phase1 -> phase1_approved -> pending_phase2 -> phase2_approved -> pending_stage2_surgical -> stage2_surgical_approved -> pending_stage2_prosthetic -> completed
Dashboard stats correctly counts all stage2_* statuses in pending/approved/rejected categories
Procedures list filters (pending, completed, rejected) include Phase 3/4 statuses
Notifications use 'Phase 3' and 'Phase 4' terminology in user-facing messages
Nurse role correctly restricted: cannot create/approve/edit, can only view approved/completed procedures
Phase 3 and Phase 4 rejection flows work correctly with proper status and notification creation
Fixed test_stage2_workflow.py assertions to match updated error messages (Phase 2/Phase 3 terminology)
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully tested for Phase 3/Phase 4 workflow. All API endpoints working. Internal status codes use 'stage2_surgical' and 'stage2_prosthetic' for DB stability. Error messages and notifications use 'Phase 3' and 'Phase 4' terminology. Nurse role restrictions fully enforced.

tested_features.1_login_all_roles: PASS - All 5 roles (student, supervisor, implant_incharge, administrator, nurse) login successfully
tested_features.2_full_workflow: PASS - Complete 4-phase workflow tested: Create -> Phase 1 dual approval -> Phase 2 submit & dual approval -> Phase 3 submit & dual approval -> Phase 4 submit & dual approval -> Completed
tested_features.3_dashboard_stats: PASS - Returns total, pending, approved, rejected counts with Stage 2 statuses included
tested_features.4_procedures_filters: PASS - ?status=pending includes pending_stage2_surgical/prosthetic, ?status=completed includes stage2_surgical_approved/completed, ?status=rejected includes stage2_surgical/prosthetic_rejected
tested_features.5_notification_terminology: PASS - Notifications use 'Phase 3' and 'Phase 4' in messages, not 'Stage 2'
tested_features.6_nurse_restrictions: PASS - Nurse cannot create (403), cannot approve (403), cannot view pending (403), cannot edit (403), can only see approved/completed
tested_features.7_rejection_flows: PASS - Phase 3 rejection -> status: stage2_surgical_rejected with notification. Phase 4 rejection -> status: stage2_prosthetic_rejected with notification

tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/approve: PASS - Dual approval for Phase 1 and Phase 2
tested_endpoints.GET /api/notifications: PASS - Returns notifications with Phase 3/4 terminology
